family: HNTT6 (Pre-Assembly Insertion Nut for 6 Series Aluminum Extrusions)
cad_status: FETCHED (STEP_AP203, hands-off in-page cadFormatList/cadDownload flow, single attempt, no retries needed)
drawing_status: RETRIEVED (both the live detail-page drawing GIF and the printed catalog PDF page; literal slot-width dimension confirmed on the catalog PDF's HFS6-Series icon)
known_contradictions: NONE for this exact PN. NOTE: the visually similar HNTT8 family ("8 Series") was investigated first and REJECTED -- its own catalog drawing dimensions the HFS8-Series groove at 10 mm, not 8 mm (see ../_REJECTED_HNTT8 evidence in the parent _plain_nut/ dir). HNTT6 ("6 Series" / HFS6) is the MISUMI family whose catalog drawing literally dimensions the groove at 8 mm -- counter-intuitively the numeral in MISUMI's series name does not equal the slot width in mm.
